nasb.text: For the lips of a priest should preserve knowledge, and men should seek instruction from his mouth; for he is the messenger of the Lord of hosts.

esv.text: For the lips of a priest should guard knowledge, and people should seek instruction from his mouth, for he is the messenger of the Lord of hosts.

cnv.text: 祭司的嘴當保存知識，人要從他的口中尋求教訓，因為他是萬軍耶和華的使者。

ccb.text: 祭司的嘴唇应持守知识，人民应从他口中寻求训诲，因为他是万军之耶和华的使者。

csbs.text: 祭司的嘴当谨守知识，人当从他口中寻求训诲，因为他是万军之耶和华的使者。”
